category_sources: Official Apple source repository includes the telnet client and telnet manual page.
source_facts.description says telnet is a user interface to the TELNET protocol.
display_name_sources: Official Apple source tree and man page use the command name telnet.
docs_sources: Official Apple source distribution includes telnet README/source directory.
Official Apple source distribution includes telnet/telnet.1 as the command manual page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/apple-oss-distributions/remote_cmds, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official Apple source tree contains the telnet client and manual page.
source_facts.description identifies the TELNET protocol user interface.
